title: oncostylis bivalvis
intro: Oncostylis bivalvis, also known as the Two-horned Stachys, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, and have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oncostylis bivalvis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Oncostylis bivalvis are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
